entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop important in the semi-arid tropics.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographical region where sorghum is a primary cereal crop.

entities.name: INSECT PESTS
entities.description: Species that cause significant annual losses to sorghum crops worldwide.

entities.name: SORGHUM SHOOT FLY
entities.description: Atherigona soccata, a major insect pest of sorghum.

entities.name: STEM BORERS
entities.description: Includes Chilo partellus, Busseola fusca, and Diatraea spp, major pests of sorghum.

entities.name: SORGHUM MIDGE
entities.description: Stenodiplosis sorghicola, a major insect pest of sorghum.

entities.name: HEAD BUGS
entities.description: Includes Calocoris angustatus and Eurystylus oldi, major pests of sorghum.

entities.name: HOST-PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: An effective mechanism for controlling insect pests in sorghum.

entities.name: SORGHUM GERMPLASM
entities.description: A collection of sorghum accessions from worldwide sources used for research.

entities.name: SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating sorghum germplasm to identify stable sources of resistance.

entities.name: SORGHUM IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing sorghum varieties by selecting lines with resistance to target pests.
